---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement that fits Vela's local-first companion vision
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What Is Missing?

Describe the experience gap in plain language.

## Your Proposal

What would you like Vela to do differently?

## Why It Fits Vela

Explain how this supports the project as a local AI companion instead of a generic productivity assistant.

## Scope

Which area does this touch?

- avatar / animation
- emotion / relationship
- memory
- voice / TTS / lip sync
- onboarding / settings
- desktop UX
- packaging / release
- docs / community

## User Flow

If this feature existed, what would the user do and what would Vela do back?

## Alternatives Considered

List other approaches you thought about, if any.

## References

Mockups, examples, screenshots, clips, or repo references.
